meta.title: Toshi — Modern payments. No permission needed.
meta.description: Toshi is the permissionless payments network to pay and get paid with the simplicity of Apple Pay — open, non-custodial, with no annual subscriptions and no losing control of your money.

hero.subhead: Pay and get paid with the simplicity of Apple Pay — open, non-custodial, and without anyone deciding if you qualify.
hero.transitionTitle: Pay and get paid without asking permission.
hero.transitionSubtitle: One network, both sides: tap to pay, link or checkout to charge.

problem.title: Paying and getting paid shouldn't need anyone's approval.
problem.intro: Banks, Apple Pay, Google Pay and the legacy processors turned something as basic as moving money into a maze of approvals, contracts, hidden fees and accounts that can be frozen overnight.

items.title: Closed approvals
items.body: Verified domains, keys and manual reviews before anyone can send or receive a single dollar.

items.title: Hidden fees
items.body: Annual subscriptions to charge, spreads and surcharges to pay. The price quietly goes up every year.

items.title: Gatekeeper dependency
items.body: If Apple, Google or your bank decides so, your account stops working tomorrow. No appeal.

items.title: Frozen money
items.body: Funds sit in transit for days, in accounts that aren't yours, with opaque holdbacks and blocks.

solution.title: A payments network that actually belongs to everyone on it.
solution.body: Toshi is the open network to pay and get paid like Apple Pay — without asking anyone for permission. Familiar for whoever pays, sovereign for whoever charges.
solution.imageCaption: For people who move money on their own terms.

pillars.title: Permissionless
pillars.body: No forms, no approvals, no waiting. If you have a device, you can already pay and charge.

pillars.title: Familiar
pillars.body: The experience everyone already knows: one sheet, one tap, done.

pillars.title: Sovereign
pillars.body: Money moves straight between wallets. You sign, you decide, you custody.

twoSides.title: Pay with Toshi. Get paid with Toshi.
twoSides.subtitle: The same network, from both sides of the counter. Pick where you start.

pay.title: Pay with Toshi
pay.body: Top up your account and pay anywhere Toshi is accepted — as simple as Apple Pay, but open and yours.
points: Pay in seconds with Face ID or fingerprint
No frozen accounts, no hidden fees
Your money stays in your wallet until you pay

charge.title: Get paid with Toshi
charge.body: Accept payments without the paperwork of a traditional gateway. No manual approvals, no long contracts, lower fees.
points: Funds land straight in your wallet
No subscriptions, no gatekeepers, no holdbacks

network.title: Both sides, connected.
network.subtitle: No middlemen sitting between you and your money. The payment goes straight from the person to the business.

steps.label: Person
steps.title: Pays in one tap
steps.body: Confirms with a passkey — the same flow as Apple Pay.

steps.label: Toshi
steps.title: Routes it openly
steps.body: Toshi coordinates the payment without ever holding the money.

steps.label: Business
steps.title: Receives instantly
steps.body: Funds land directly in the business wallet, ready to use.

network.footnote: No approvals. No custody. No one in the middle deciding.

howItWorks.title: Four steps. No runaround.
howItWorks.subtitle: From opening Toshi to your first payment — sent or received — it takes less than thirty seconds.

steps.title: Create or connect your wallet
steps.body: A passkey on your device is enough. No seed phrase to store, no extension to install.

steps.title: Pay or share a charge
steps.body: Pay with a tap, or generate a link, QR or SDK to get paid. Works on web, app and in person.

steps.title: Confirm with a passkey
steps.body: Approve with Face ID or fingerprint. The same flow as Apple Pay — without the restrictions.

steps.title: Settle instantly
steps.body: Money moves straight between wallets, ready to use, convert or spend.

benefits.title: Designed to feel in control from the very first payment.

items.title: Non-custodial
items.body: Money never goes through our hands. It moves straight from one wallet to another, no middlemen.

items.title: No subscriptions
items.body: You only pay a small fee when money moves. No annual fees, no minimums, no surprises.

items.title: No gatekeepers
items.body: No one can pause your account, freeze your funds or decide if you qualify.

items.title: Familiar UX
items.body: Pay and get paid with the same fluidity as Apple Pay or Google Pay.

items.title: Global from day one
items.body: Send or receive between Madrid, Buenos Aires or Tokyo with the exact same flow.

items.title: Open by default
items.body: Open APIs, public SDKs and verifiable standards. No lock-in.

forWhom.title: For everyone who pays. For everyone who gets paid.
forWhom.imageCaption: From local storefront to global checkout.

items.title: For everyday payments
items.body: Top up once and pay anywhere Toshi is accepted — no frozen accounts, no surprise fees.

items.title: For physical and online stores
items.body: Accept payments at the counter or in checkout — without six-month contracts.

items.title: For independent income
items.body: Send a link, get paid, see it in your wallet in seconds — without a platform skimming 30 %.

items.title: For product teams
items.body: Integrate payments through open APIs and a flow your team can adapt.

security.title: Sovereignty without giving up simplicity.
security.body: Toshi relies on native device passkeys and non-custodial wallets. No seed phrases to lose, no servers of ours to compromise.

items.title: Native passkeys
items.body: Use Face ID, Touch ID or Windows Hello. The key never leaves the device.

items.title: Local signatures
items.body: Every transaction is signed on the user's hardware. We never see the key.

items.title: Non-custodial
items.body: Money stays in your wallet. If Toshi disappears, your funds are still yours.

items.title: Auditable and open
items.body: Everything that matters happens on-chain or via public standards. Verify, don't trust.

finalCta.title: Pay and get paid. Without asking permission.
finalCta.body: Join the waitlist and be one of the first on the Toshi network.
